title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
